title: Banking App Redesign
subtitle: Reimagining Mobile Banking for India's Digital Future
problem_statement: Existing 'Banking App' prototype lacks zero-to-one innovation, personalized financial guidance, and intuitive design for diverse Indian users.

pillars.title: Financial Anxiety
pillars.insight: Users worry about savings, investments, and unexpected expenses.

pillars.title: Digital Literacy
pillars.insight: Many struggle with complex banking interfaces and jargon.

pillars.title: Time Scarcity
pillars.insight: Users need quick, efficient transactions and insights on the go.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we simplify financial management for all users?
How might users achieve financial goals effortlessly?
How might we integrate AI for proactive financial health?

points.name: HDFC Bank
points.desc: High trust, low innovation, traditional banking.

points.name: Jupiter
points.desc: Lower trust, high innovation, modern features.

points.name: Google Pay
points.desc: High trust, medium innovation, payment utility.

solution.name: Banking App 2.0
solution.desc: Targeting high trust with cutting-edge, inclusive innovation.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need smart tools to grow my money.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy professional seeking efficient, intelligent financial management and investment opportunities.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Budgeting for family is always a challenge.
personas.bio: Manages household finances, seeks simple budgeting tools and family savings options.

insights: "Am I saving enough for the future?"

points.action: Replace generic transaction list with AI-categorized spending insights.
points.benefit: Users gain clarity on spending habits.

points.action: Integrate UPI payments directly into a 'Quick Pay' dashboard widget.
Adapt gamification principles for savings goals and financial literacy.
points.benefit: Engages users, encourages better financial habits.

points.action: Modify onboarding to include vernacular language selection and visual guides.
points.benefit: Increases accessibility for diverse user base.

pivot.before: Current 'Banking App' focuses on displaying raw data and basic transactions.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from data display to intelligent financial guidance, proactive insights, and simplified actions.
pivot.after: A 'Banking App' that anticipates needs, offers personalized advice, and empowers financial growth.

screens.title: Low-Fi
layout: Bottom Nav (Home, Pay, Invest, Goals, Profile)

annotations.title: AI Assistant
annotations.rationale: Proactive financial advice, spending alerts, goal tracking.

annotations.title: Goal-Based Savings
annotations.rationale: Visually track progress towards specific financial objectives.

annotations.title: Vernacular Support
annotations.rationale: Enhances inclusivity and ease of use for non-English speakers.

data.finding: Key information like spending trends is not immediately visible.
Iconography and button styles vary across different screens.
Transfer confirmation lacks clear summary before final submission.
No customization options for dashboard layout or quick actions.
